name: ambiguous_visa_language
description: No mention of visa either way — should be Unclear, not Yes or No.

job.title: Senior Product Manager — Enterprise SaaS
job.full_description: Freshworks is hiring a Senior PM to own our CRM product suite. You will work with enterprise customers to build workflow automation and integration features. 5-10 years of PM experience in B2B SaaS required. Strong analytical skills and experience with SQL preferred. Competitive compensation including equity. We offer great benefits and a collaborative culture. This role is based in San Mateo with hybrid work flexibility.
